items.title: Public Alpha Rehearsal Evidence v0
items.text: implemented as supervised local/static evidence using existing safe-mode checks; no deployment was performed.

items.title: LIVE_ALPHA_01 Production Public-Alpha Wrapper
items.text: implemented as a localhost-default public-alpha wrapper and config check; no deployment, no live source probes, and no production approval.

items.title: Public Publication Plane Contracts v0
items.text: implemented as route, data, client profile, deployment target, redirect, and base-path governance before deployment.

items.title: GitHub Pages Deployment Enablement v0
items.text: implemented as a static-only workflow and artifact check for publishing public_site; deployment success is unverified until GitHub Actions evidence exists.

items.title: Static Site Generation Migration v0
items.text: implemented as a stdlib-only generator that writes site/dist while public_site remains the deployable artifact.

items.title: Generated Public Data Summaries v0
items.text: implemented as deterministic static /data summaries from governed inventories and eval/audit sources; no live API, probes, or external observations.

items.title: Lite/Text/Files Seed Surfaces v0
items.text: implemented as static no-JS/no-download compatibility seed surfaces under lite/, text/, and files/.

items.title: Static Resolver Demo Snapshots v0
items.text: implemented as fixture-backed static no-JS demo snapshots under demo/; no live search, API, backend hosting, or external observations.

items.title: Custom Domain / Alternate Host Readiness v0
items.text: implemented as provider-neutral static-host readiness inventory, base-path policy, operator checklist, and validator; no DNS, CNAME, alternate-host deployment, provider config, or backend hosting.

items.title: Live Backend Handoff Contract v0
items.text: implemented as a contract-only /api/v1 reservation, capability flag, and error-envelope layer; no backend is hosted and /api/v1 is not live.

items.title: Live Probe Gateway Contract v0
items.text: implemented as disabled-by-default source probe policy, caps, cache/evidence requirements, and operator gates; no probes or network calls.

items.title: Rust Query Planner Parity Candidate v0
items.text: implemented as an isolated Rust planner candidate against expanded Python-oracle goldens; Python remains the oracle and Rust is not wired into runtime.

items.title: Compatibility Surface Strategy v0
items.text: implemented as cross-surface strategy, capability matrix, route matrix, and old-client/native/snapshot/relay readiness policy; no new runtime behavior.

items.title: Signed Snapshot Format v0
items.text: implemented as a static/offline snapshot format contract, checksum policy, signature-placeholder policy, and deterministic repo seed example under snapshots/examples/static_snapshot_v0; no production signing keys, executable downloads, public /snapshots/ route, relay, or native runtime.

items.title: Relay Surface Design v0
items.text: recommended next non-network design milestone for future operator-controlled local relay surfaces; no FTP, SMB, WebDAV, proxy, backend, or native runtime is implemented here.

items.title: Manual Observation Batch 0 Execution
items.text: human-operated external baseline observations for selected query/system slots; remains parallel manual work.

items.title: Internet Archive Live Probe v0
items.text: future only, after explicit human approval, live probe gateway review, and source-policy review; not queued for unattended implementation.

panels.title: Machine-Readable Publication State
paragraphs: Generated public data feeds lite, text, and files seed surfaces while preserving the static-only publication posture.
